== Notes for [[Item:Q115901|Q115901]] ==

Duque de Asturias
Conde de Oviedo (1063)

Duque de Asturias
Conde de Oviedo (1063)

Duke of Asturias. Count of Oviedo.

Duke of Asturias,

!DESCENT: Frederick Lewis Weis and Walter Lee Sheppard, Jr., Ancestral Roots
of Certain American Colonists Who Came to America Before 1700, 7th ed., at 104
(1992). Line 113A-23.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
